planSummary: Manual QA of /categories list + create/edit/delete dialogs.
runSummary: Chrome DevTools MCP session on localhost:5103 with empty seed (category created during test).

cases.text: Navigate to /categories. Expect 200, breadcrumbs, StatsGrid (4), FilterBar, DataTable, no console errors.

cases.summary: Create dialog — empty submit shows Arabic validation
cases.text: Open 'إضافة فئة' and click submit with empty form. Expect 'هذا الحقل مطلوب' on nameAr.

cases.summary: Create with sortOrder accepted and persisted (historical unfillable bug)
cases.text: Fill nameAr='فئة اختبار QA', nameEn='QA Test Category', sortOrder=15. Submit. Expect row visible with sortOrder=15.
Type 6 chars 'اختبار' into search. Expect 1 request. Observed: 6 requests — no debounce implemented in useCategoriesList hook.
Select 'غير نشطة' from dropdown. Expect isActive=false request + empty state. Observed: correct.

cases.summary: Edit dialog prefilled + PATCH isActive swap
cases.text: Open edit on a category, toggle isActive off, save. Expect status badge changes and StatsGrid active/inactive counts swap.
Open delete dialog. Expect description contains the row name. Observed: 'هل أنت متأكد من حذف فئة اختبار QA؟ لا يمكن حذف فئات تحتوي على خدمات.'.
Confirm delete. Expect 204, row removed, StatsGrid total decremented.
